steps.title: Identify two points on the line of best fit
steps.content: Reading the scatterplot, the line of best fit passes approximately through $(0, 1)$ and $(1{,}800, 16)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope and equation
steps.content: The slope is $$m = \frac{16 - 1}{1{,}800 - 0} = \frac{15}{1{,}800} = \frac{1}{120}.$$ With y-intercept $1$, the line is $y = \dfrac{1}{120}x + 1$.

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A ($16$): too high — that is the value near $x = 1{,}800$, not $1{,}200$.
  • B ($14$): overshoots the predicted value at $x = 1{,}200$.
  • C ($11$): matches the computed prediction.
  • D ($6$): far below the line at $x = 1{,}200$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
